1.body: Can reproduce. This also happens with a null password field, not just empty string.
Assigned to @agent-bot — please fix before the v2.1 release.
Workaround: validate input before calling bcrypt. Add `if not password: return 400`.

3.body: This blocks the React frontend from making any API calls.

4.body: We should use SQLAlchemy with async support if we switch to Postgres.

7.body: Looking good so far. Please add the X-Total-Count header too.
